jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ustraa
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!
